title: Flambeed Smoky Middle-Eastern Ground Meat Kibbeh
description: Snappy kibbeh with smoky flavor from chipotle peppers, served in mason jars and flamb4ed with ginger cordial.
instructions: In a large bowl, mix together ground lamb and beef until just combined.
Add the minced chipotle peppers, salt, and black pepper to the bowl and mix until just combined.
Using your hands, shape the mixture into small patties, about 1 1/2 inches in diameter.
Place the patties in a baking dish and bake for 20 minutes, or until cooked through.
While the patties are baking, prepare the ginger cordial by heating the ginger ale and ginger syrup in a saucepan over low heat until warm.
Once the patties are done, remove them from the oven and carefully place them in a mason jar.
Pour the warm ginger cordial over the patties, being careful not to overflow the jar.
Flamb4e the mixture by carefully igniting the cordial with a match or lighter, then extinguishing the flames with a spoon.
Serve the kibbeh in the mason jars, garnished with chopped fresh parsley if desired.
